items.answer: Public transport works until midnight.
alt_answers: Public transportation runs until midnight.

items.answer: A big truck is driving along the road.
alt_answers: A large truck is driving down the road.

items.answer: The trolleybus stopped near the store.
alt_answers: The trolleybus stopped by the shop.

items.answer: The minibus goes faster than the bus.
alt_answers: The marshrutka travels faster than the bus.

items.answer: There were many people in the train car.
alt_answers: There were a lot of people in the carriage.

items.prompt: Не ходите по рельсам, это опасно.
items.answer: Do not walk on the rails, it is dangerous.
alt_answers: Don't walk on the tracks, it's dangerous.

items.answer: The train is standing on the third platform.
alt_answers: The train is on platform three.

items.answer: I am waiting for you at the stop.
alt_answers: I'm waiting for you at the bus stop.

items.answer: Go through the turnstile.
alt_answers: Pass through the turnstile.

items.answer: The escalator does not work today.
alt_answers: The escalator isn't working today.

items.answer: We will meet at the train station.
alt_answers: Let's meet at the station.

items.prompt: Утром в городе всегда большие пробки.
items.answer: In the morning there are always big traffic jams in the city.
alt_answers: In the morning the city always has bad traffic jams.

items.answer: Turn right at the intersection.
alt_answers: Turn right at the crossroads.

items.answer: The red light is on at the traffic light.
alt_answers: The traffic light is red.

items.answer: This sign forbids parking.
alt_answers: This sign prohibits parking.

items.answer: A pedestrian must walk on the sidewalk.
alt_answers: A pedestrian should walk on the pavement.

items.answer: Every passenger must show a ticket.
alt_answers: Each passenger has to show their ticket.

items.answer: How much does the fare cost in the metro?
alt_answers: What's the metro fare?

items.answer: I do not know this route.
alt_answers: I don't know this route.

items.prompt: На следующей станции у нас пересадка.
items.answer: At the next station we have a transfer.
alt_answers: We change trains at the next station.

items.prompt: Мой друг живёт в тихом переулке.
items.answer: My friend lives in a quiet alley.
alt_answers: My friend lives on a quiet lane.
My friend lives on a quiet side street.

items.answer: Nevsky Avenue is the main street of Petersburg.
alt_answers: Nevsky Prospekt is the main street of Saint Petersburg.

items.answer: It is fastest to drive on the highway.
alt_answers: Driving on the motorway is the fastest.

items.prompt: Дети идут по тротуару в школу.
items.answer: The children are walking to school on the sidewalk.
alt_answers: The children walk along the pavement to school.

items.answer: There are many cars on the highway today.
alt_answers: There's a lot of traffic on the highway today.

items.answer: This lane is only for buses.
alt_answers: This is a bus-only lane.

items.answer: Gasoline has become more expensive again.
alt_answers: Petrol has gotten more expensive again.

items.answer: The wheel of my bicycle broke.
alt_answers: My bicycle's wheel broke.

items.answer: Hold the steering wheel tighter.
alt_answers: Grip the steering wheel tighter.

items.answer: In winter you need to change the tires.
alt_answers: You have to change tyres in winter.

items.prompt: У этой машины не работает фара.
items.answer: The headlight on this car does not work.
alt_answers: This car's headlight isn't working.

items.answer: You cannot park here.
alt_answers: Parking is not allowed here.

items.answer: It is dangerous to overtake on a turn.
alt_answers: It's dangerous to pass on a turn.

items.answer: The driver started to brake before the traffic light.
alt_answers: The driver began braking before the traffic light.

items.prompt: Мой отец учит меня водить машину.
items.answer: My father is teaching me to drive a car.
alt_answers: My father teaches me to drive.

items.prompt: Этот поезд везёт пассажиров на юг.
items.answer: This train transports passengers to the south.
alt_answers: This train carries passengers south.

items.answer: Tomorrow I am flying to Moscow.
alt_answers: I fly to Moscow tomorrow.

items.answer: Be careful at the turn.
alt_answers: Be attentive at the turn.

items.answer: An accident happened on the highway.
alt_answers: There was an accident on the motorway.

items.answer: The policeman wrote me a fine.
alt_answers: The police officer gave me a fine.

items.answer: I recently got my driver's license.
alt_answers: I got my driving licence recently.

items.answer: Do not forget to fasten the seatbelt.
alt_answers: Don't forget to put on your seatbelt.

items.answer: Call the ambulance urgently!
alt_answers: Call an ambulance immediately!

items.answer: The train driver announced the next station.
alt_answers: The engineer announced the next station.

items.answer: The conductor is checking our tickets.
alt_answers: The conductor checks our tickets.

items.answer: There is an underground crossing in Moscow.
alt_answers: Moscow has an underground passage.

items.answer: Our flight is delayed by an hour.
alt_answers: Our flight is being delayed for an hour.

items.answer: Boarding the plane has already begun.
alt_answers: Boarding for the flight has already started.

items.answer: The departure of the train is at seven o'clock.
alt_answers: The train departs at seven.

items.prompt: Прибытие поезда в Петербург в полдень.
items.answer: The train's arrival in Petersburg is at noon.
alt_answers: The train arrives in Saint Petersburg at noon.
